_fixture_metadata.source_ref: https://docs.multiversx.com/sdk-and-tools/rest-api/transactions/ — shallow status values: success, invalid, pending, fail. MultiversX convention for failed tx: status='fail' with a receipt describing the failure.
_fixture_metadata.purpose: F2b critical input. The dual-schema reader, fed this response, MUST produce ExecutionResult(status='fail', schema_path_used='andromeda_top_level'). The watcher, fed this observation, MUST yield AnchorIncludedEntry followed by AnchorFailedEntry — NOT AnchorSettledEntry. The audit tool MUST return VerifyResult(verdict='execution_failed').
caveats: The exact `receipt` shape for a failed self-addressed 0-EGLD transfer varies by failure cause. This fixture models a generic out-of-gas-style failure. If the real runtime failure cause for a DSM anchor differs, update the `receipt.data` field — but the status='fail' discriminator is what F2b actually tests.
